name: Softr
highlight_text: Category: Client management and project management software
description:
What Softr does

Softr is a white label client portal for developing custom web applications and improving organizational processes.

Also, the platform’s ability accommodate growth means you  won't have to reconsider your client portal as your business grows.

Source: Softr

Key features

  • Client management with client portals 
  • Sharing updates through the project management feature.
  • Automated billing system for accurate invoicing.
  • Integration with other applications and tools.
  • Pre-built templates for quickly building custom features.

Benefits of Using Softr

  • The simplified UI/UX makes it an easy platform for non-tech people
  • By automating administrative functions such as billing, it gives team members more time to focus on other important tasks. 
  • Integration with other management tools and applications ensures uninterrupted workflows and facilitates timely deliveries. 
  • It ensures that everyone is always on the same page on a project.

Pricing

The free plan comes with a lot of limitations. The upgrades available include:

  • Basic plan at $49/month
  • Professional plan at $139/month
  • Business plan at $269/month

Pros

✅Readily made templates 

✅Easy to use 

✅Scalable and flexible 

Cons

🚫The templates may not align with the brand

🚫Difficulties integrating some relevant tools.

🚫Upgrades are expensive
